records.name: Decision Center Rule 1
records.description: Every decision identifies a supported Builder decision and source owner.

attributes.rule_text: Every decision identifies a supported Builder decision and source owner.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 2
records.description: Priority exposes material factors and never relies on an unexplained score.

attributes.rule_text: Priority exposes material factors and never relies on an unexplained score.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 3
records.description: High-impact actions require configured human approval.

attributes.rule_text: High-impact actions require configured human approval.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 4
records.description: A recorded decision requires owner, rationale, evidence snapshot, and expected outcome.

attributes.rule_text: A recorded decision requires owner, rationale, evidence snapshot, and expected outcome.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 5
records.description: Completed approval history and evidence snapshots are append-only.

attributes.rule_text: Completed approval history and evidence snapshots are append-only.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 6
records.description: Overdue decisions escalate only through a declared policy.

attributes.rule_text: Overdue decisions escalate only through a declared policy.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 7
records.description: Outcome capture never rewrites the original expectation.

attributes.rule_text: Outcome capture never rewrites the original expectation.

records.name: Decision Center Rule 8
records.description: AI confidence cannot grant authority.

attributes.rule_text: AI confidence cannot grant authority.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 1
records.description: Memory never becomes the transactional source of truth for operational entities.

attributes.rule_text: Memory never becomes the transactional source of truth for operational entities.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 2
records.description: Captured context remains reconstructable after source records change.

attributes.rule_text: Captured context remains reconstructable after source records change.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 3
records.description: Permission filters execute before semantic retrieval.

attributes.rule_text: Permission filters execute before semantic retrieval.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 4
records.description: Corrections create linked superseding versions.

attributes.rule_text: Corrections create linked superseding versions.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 5
records.description: Sources, capture time, actor, and policy are mandatory.

attributes.rule_text: Sources, capture time, actor, and policy are mandatory.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 6
records.description: Tenant data never enters a general training corpus without explicit authorization.

attributes.rule_text: Tenant data never enters a general training corpus without explicit authorization.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 7
records.description: Legal holds override scheduled deletion.

attributes.rule_text: Legal holds override scheduled deletion.

records.name: Business Memory Rule 8
records.description: A lesson must link to an outcome or be labeled as an observation.

attributes.rule_text: A lesson must link to an outcome or be labeled as an observation.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 1
records.description: Business logic never depends on provider-specific response objects.

attributes.rule_text: Business logic never depends on provider-specific response objects.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 2
records.description: Every production prompt and route has an approved version.

attributes.rule_text: Every production prompt and route has an approved version.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 3
records.description: Every output is schema-validated before use.

attributes.rule_text: Every output is schema-validated before use.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 4
records.description: High-impact outputs require human review.

attributes.rule_text: High-impact outputs require human review.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 5
records.description: Retrieval is tenant- and permission-scoped.

attributes.rule_text: Retrieval is tenant- and permission-scoped.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 6
records.description: Fallback never converts a failed inference into a successful fact.

attributes.rule_text: Fallback never converts a failed inference into a successful fact.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 7
records.description: Model, prompt, sources, cost, latency, and safety metadata are traceable.

attributes.rule_text: Model, prompt, sources, cost, latency, and safety metadata are traceable.

records.name: AI Engine Rule 8
records.description: Tenant data is not used for general model training without authorization.

attributes.rule_text: Tenant data is not used for general model training without authorization.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 1
records.description: Every active workspace has at least one protected owner.

attributes.rule_text: Every active workspace has at least one protected owner.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 2
records.description: A user may delegate only permissions they possess and may delegate.

attributes.rule_text: A user may delegate only permissions they possess and may delegate.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 3
records.description: Workspace context is derived server-side.

attributes.rule_text: Workspace context is derived server-side.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 4
records.description: Direct routes remain server-authorized even when hidden in UI.

attributes.rule_text: Direct routes remain server-authorized even when hidden in UI.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 5
records.description: Sensitive changes require recent authentication.

attributes.rule_text: Sensitive changes require recent authentication.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 6
records.description: Role changes are versioned and auditable.

attributes.rule_text: Role changes are versioned and auditable.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 7
records.description: Audit records are append-only and tamper-evident.

attributes.rule_text: Audit records are append-only and tamper-evident.

records.name: Identity, Workspace, Permissions & Audit Rule 8
records.description: Support access is time-, purpose-, and permission-bound.

attributes.rule_text: Support access is time-, purpose-, and permission-bound.

records.name: Finance Rule 1
records.description: Every posted journal balances debits and credits in one currency basis.

attributes.rule_text: Every posted journal balances debits and credits in one currency basis.

records.name: Finance Rule 2
records.description: Posted entries are immutable; corrections use reversal and replacement.

attributes.rule_text: Posted entries are immutable; corrections use reversal and replacement.

records.name: Finance Rule 3
records.description: Closed periods reject posting unless reopened by authorized control.

attributes.rule_text: Closed periods reject posting unless reopened by authorized control.

records.name: Finance Rule 4
records.description: Money uses decimal arithmetic and explicit currency.

attributes.rule_text: Money uses decimal arithmetic and explicit currency.

records.name: Finance Rule 5
records.description: Invoice totals equal validated line, tax, discount, and rounding components.

attributes.rule_text: Invoice totals equal validated line, tax, discount, and rounding components.

records.name: Finance Rule 6
records.description: Payments cannot exceed permitted open amount without an explicit credit policy.

attributes.rule_text: Payments cannot exceed permitted open amount without an explicit credit policy.

records.name: Finance Rule 7
records.description: Reconciliation records source, match method, actor, and difference.

attributes.rule_text: Reconciliation records source, match method, actor, and difference.

records.name: Finance Rule 8
records.description: Forecasts disclose assumptions, horizon, interval, and model version.

attributes.rule_text: Forecasts disclose assumptions, horizon, interval, and model version.

records.name: Inventory Rule 1
records.description: Available quantity equals on-hand minus valid reservations and control holds.

attributes.rule_text: Available quantity equals on-hand minus valid reservations and control holds.

records.name: Inventory Rule 2
records.description: Every quantity change creates an immutable stock movement.

attributes.rule_text: Every quantity change creates an immutable stock movement.

records.name: Inventory Rule 3
records.description: Completed movements are reversed, not edited.

attributes.rule_text: Completed movements are reversed, not edited.

records.name: Inventory Rule 4
records.description: Negative stock is prohibited unless workspace policy explicitly permits it.

attributes.rule_text: Negative stock is prohibited unless workspace policy explicitly permits it.

records.name: Inventory Rule 5
records.description: Transfers require balanced source and destination movements.

attributes.rule_text: Transfers require balanced source and destination movements.

records.name: Inventory Rule 6
records.description: Receipt quantity beyond tolerance requires approval.

attributes.rule_text: Receipt quantity beyond tolerance requires approval.

records.name: Inventory Rule 7
records.description: Lot/serial-controlled products require identifiers at configured transitions.

attributes.rule_text: Lot/serial-controlled products require identifiers at configured transitions.

records.name: Inventory Rule 8
records.description: Reorder recommendations disclose forecast, lead time, safety stock, constraints, and confidence.

attributes.rule_text: Reorder recommendations disclose forecast, lead time, safety stock, constraints, and confidence.

records.name: CRM Rule 1
records.description: A person or organization is not duplicated when a verified matching rule identifies the same party.

attributes.rule_text: A person or organization is not duplicated when a verified matching rule identifies the same party.

records.name: CRM Rule 2
records.description: Pipeline stages have ordered entry and exit criteria.

attributes.rule_text: Pipeline stages have ordered entry and exit criteria.

records.name: CRM Rule 3
records.description: Opportunity probability is stage-derived unless an authorized override includes reason.

attributes.rule_text: Opportunity probability is stage-derived unless an authorized override includes reason.

records.name: CRM Rule 4
records.description: Activities retain actor, channel, time, outcome, and related party.

attributes.rule_text: Activities retain actor, channel, time, outcome, and related party.

records.name: CRM Rule 5
records.description: Marketing communication requires valid consent and suppression checks.

attributes.rule_text: Marketing communication requires valid consent and suppression checks.

records.name: CRM Rule 6
records.description: Customer lifetime value uses an approved Finance definition.

attributes.rule_text: Customer lifetime value uses an approved Finance definition.

records.name: CRM Rule 7
records.description: Churn recommendations expose factors and confidence.

attributes.rule_text: Churn recommendations expose factors and confidence.

records.name: CRM Rule 8
records.description: Merged records preserve source lineage and audit history.

attributes.rule_text: Merged records preserve source lineage and audit history.

records.name: Analytics Rule 1
records.description: Every metric has one owner, formula, unit, sources, filters, refresh policy, and version.

attributes.rule_text: Every metric has one owner, formula, unit, sources, filters, refresh policy, and version.

records.name: Analytics Rule 2
records.description: Dashboards answer a declared decision question.

attributes.rule_text: Dashboards answer a declared decision question.

records.name: Analytics Rule 3
records.description: Drill-down reconciles to the displayed value within documented rounding.

attributes.rule_text: Drill-down reconciles to the displayed value within documented rounding.

records.name: Analytics Rule 4
records.description: Stale or failed data is visible and never silently presented as current.

attributes.rule_text: Stale or failed data is visible and never silently presented as current.

records.name: Analytics Rule 5
records.description: Exports enforce the same permissions as interactive views.

attributes.rule_text: Exports enforce the same permissions as interactive views.

records.name: Analytics Rule 6
records.description: Metric changes create a new version and effective date.

attributes.rule_text: Metric changes create a new version and effective date.

records.name: Analytics Rule 7
records.description: Charts include accessible text or tabular alternatives.

attributes.rule_text: Charts include accessible text or tabular alternatives.

records.name: Analytics Rule 8
records.description: Scheduled reports record parameters and source freshness.

attributes.rule_text: Scheduled reports record parameters and source freshness.

records.name: Documents Rule 1
records.description: A document has one authoritative current version and immutable prior versions.

attributes.rule_text: A document has one authoritative current version and immutable prior versions.

records.name: Documents Rule 2
records.description: Generated documents record template version and input snapshot.

attributes.rule_text: Generated documents record template version and input snapshot.

records.name: Documents Rule 3
records.description: Signed versions are immutable.

attributes.rule_text: Signed versions are immutable.

records.name: Documents Rule 4
records.description: Access follows workspace and linked-resource policy.

attributes.rule_text: Access follows workspace and linked-resource policy.

records.name: Documents Rule 5
records.description: File hashes detect corruption and duplicate content.

attributes.rule_text: File hashes detect corruption and duplicate content.

records.name: Documents Rule 6
records.description: Retention and legal hold are evaluated before deletion.

attributes.rule_text: Retention and legal hold are evaluated before deletion.

records.name: Documents Rule 7
records.description: OCR text is labeled as extracted and retains confidence.

attributes.rule_text: OCR text is labeled as extracted and retains confidence.

records.name: Documents Rule 8
records.description: External signatures are verified through provider evidence.

attributes.rule_text: External signatures are verified through provider evidence.

records.name: Notifications Rule 1
records.description: Every notification names the triggering event and intended action.

attributes.rule_text: Every notification names the triggering event and intended action.

records.name: Notifications Rule 2
records.description: Mandatory security and approval notices cannot be disabled.

attributes.rule_text: Mandatory security and approval notices cannot be disabled.

records.name: Notifications Rule 3
records.description: Preferences and quiet hours are evaluated before optional delivery.

attributes.rule_text: Preferences and quiet hours are evaluated before optional delivery.

records.name: Notifications Rule 4
records.description: Duplicate source events create one user-visible effect.

attributes.rule_text: Duplicate source events create one user-visible effect.

records.name: Notifications Rule 5
records.description: Template versions are immutable after publication.

attributes.rule_text: Template versions are immutable after publication.

records.name: Notifications Rule 6
records.description: Retries are bounded and terminal failure has an owner.

attributes.rule_text: Retries are bounded and terminal failure has an owner.

records.name: Notifications Rule 7
records.description: Sensitive content is minimized by channel.

attributes.rule_text: Sensitive content is minimized by channel.

records.name: Notifications Rule 8
records.description: Status is derived from per-channel delivery evidence.

attributes.rule_text: Status is derived from per-channel delivery evidence.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 1
records.description: HR sensitive fields use explicit field-level permissions.

attributes.rule_text: HR sensitive fields use explicit field-level permissions.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 2
records.description: Employment and compensation changes require effective dates and approval.

attributes.rule_text: Employment and compensation changes require effective dates and approval.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 3
records.description: Leave balances cannot become negative unless policy permits.

attributes.rule_text: Leave balances cannot become negative unless policy permits.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 4
records.description: Offboarding triggers access revocation and asset/document tasks.

attributes.rule_text: Offboarding triggers access revocation and asset/document tasks.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 5
records.description: Performance records retain author, period, acknowledgements, and versions.

attributes.rule_text: Performance records retain author, period, acknowledgements, and versions.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 6
records.description: Attendance corrections require reason and audit.

attributes.rule_text: Attendance corrections require reason and audit.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 7
records.description: Payroll-impacting outputs reconcile to approved employment terms.

attributes.rule_text: Payroll-impacting outputs reconcile to approved employment terms.

records.name: Human Resources Rule 8
records.description: AI employment recommendations require human review and bias evaluation.

attributes.rule_text: AI employment recommendations require human review and bias evaluation.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 1
records.description: Released orders reference approved BOM and routing versions.

attributes.rule_text: Released orders reference approved BOM and routing versions.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 2
records.description: Material consumption and output create inventory movements.

attributes.rule_text: Material consumption and output create inventory movements.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 3
records.description: Produced quantity, scrap, rework, and yield reconcile.

attributes.rule_text: Produced quantity, scrap, rework, and yield reconcile.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 4
records.description: Quality holds prevent unauthorized use or shipment.

attributes.rule_text: Quality holds prevent unauthorized use or shipment.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 5
records.description: Capacity scheduling respects calendar, efficiency, and committed load.

attributes.rule_text: Capacity scheduling respects calendar, efficiency, and committed load.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 6
records.description: Closed production orders are corrected through controlled adjustments.

attributes.rule_text: Closed production orders are corrected through controlled adjustments.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 7
records.description: Actual cost reconciles material, labor, overhead, scrap, and variance.

attributes.rule_text: Actual cost reconciles material, labor, overhead, scrap, and variance.

records.name: Manufacturing Rule 8
records.description: AI schedules and forecasts require human approval before release.

attributes.rule_text: AI schedules and forecasts require human approval before release.
